title: stellaria calycantha var. simcoei
intro: Stellaria calycantha var. simcoei, also known as Sim's Starwort, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Sim's Starwort has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds and infections. The plant's medicinal properties are also thought to contribute to its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Sim's Starwort can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
